name: development-workflow
description: Create approved product requirements, technical specifications, and reviewed plans, generate executable handoff prompts, or implement explicitly approved bounded changes.

interface.shortDescription: Create PRDs, plans, prompts, and bounded changes.
interface.longDescription: Create approved product requirements and technical specifications, produce reviewed plans and self-contained handoff prompts, or implement explicitly approved bounded changes without scope expansion.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the full PRD-to-prompt workflow, or implement an explicitly approved bounded change without expanding scope.
